name: exiros-mvp
description: Atajos multiplataforma (Windows/mac/Linux) para levantar y probar Exiros. El detalle paso a paso vive en README.md. Lista de comandos: `npm run`.

scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run env && npm run db:up && npm run migrate && npm run seed && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:web
scripts.db:reset: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml down -v && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d --wait
scripts.migrate: cd backend && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:web
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:web
scripts.test: cd backend && npm test && npm run test:e2e
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test
